title: The Depths of Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Magellan, Ivankov, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #4, Luffy as the scene develops across pages 2–5.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Magellan, Ivankov, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Move it, move it, move it !!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ACE!!! We came to save you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: There's no mistake, this is the cell!!

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: no mistake!!! TH... THERE's no mistake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We were one step too late....!!

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: Hey... who are you, old man...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The lift's gate is open too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The wheel is locked!! It won't move!!

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Magellan, Ivankov, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down.
